title: ipmitool bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1.8.19-10]
- Apply Debian/upstream patch: 137aeb64, fixes ipmitool lan print
- Add patch that partially reverts 6e037d6bfb to fix regression in 1.8.19
  Among others fixes ipmievd startup (fedora#2303185)
full_text:
[1.8.19-10]
- Apply Debian/upstream patch: 137aeb64, fixes ipmitool lan print
- Add patch that partially reverts 6e037d6bfb to fix regression in 1.8.19
  Among others fixes ipmievd startup (fedora#2303185)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23156.html
